final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [15:0] a,
  input [15:0] b,
  output reg [15:0] p
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      p <= 0;
    end else begin
      p <= a * b;
    end
  end

endmodule
